name: Carrot Bread for Bread Machine
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Fast rise yeast (OR) 2 teaspoons Active dry yeast
1 1/2 teaspoons Fast rise yeast (OR) 2 1/2 teaspoons Active dry yeast
recipeInstructions:
+ The regular loaf serves 8 people.
+ The large loaf serves 12 people.
Use the loading instructions according to your owner's manual.
Note:
- Use freshly grated carrots.
- This recipe can be used with the regular and rapid bake cycles.
